Animal Climate and Health Save Foundation
Sponsored
A moment of truth shared with the entire nation. 🌱📺

KBC contestant Siddharth Sharma spoke about Veganism, justice and equality for animals — and Amitabh Bachchan ji acknowledged it on National Television.

We wholeheartedly thank Siddharth Sharma for bringing the voices of animals into millions of homes… and we are truly proud of him for standing up for compassion, justice and a kinder world for all beings. ❤️🙏

Clip Credit - Sony Television India

#KBC #AmitabhBachchan #SiddharthSharma #Veganism #AnimalRights #JusticeForAnimals #CompassionForAll #AnimalsSaveIndia #GoVegan #MaaKaDoodh #BeTheirVoice
0:00 / 2:44
​
